initiatives.name: Really Really Free Jax
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support through free markets and resource sharing in Jacksonville. They coordinate direct assistance, free item distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for gift economy and collective care.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Jacksonville
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in Jacksonville. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.

initiatives.name: Jacksonville Palestine Solidarity Network
initiatives.description: JPSN is a Palestinian and Arab led community organization building towards a liberated Palestine in our lifetime

initiatives.name: Jax Tenants Union
initiatives.description: Tenant organizing and education on tenant's rights.
